'''Knave Squadron''' was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] that was equipped with [[E-7 E-wing multi-role starfighter|E-wing escort starfighters]].

[[File:Ewingfighter.jpg|thumb|left|[[Knave Leader]] in the battle]]
The unit saw its first action during the [[Battle of Calamari|First Battle of Mon Calamari]]. One of the first E-wing squadrons deployed in the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]], the pilots of Knave Squadron were among the reinforcements sent from [[Pinnacle Base]] to [[Dac/Legends|Dac]] following the loss of the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] ''[[Emancipator]]''. Though the squadron fought bravely, several craft and [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] were lost to defensive fire from the [[World Devastator]]s.

{{Military-stub}}
